  "findings": [
    "Proposed recovery plan violates a hard inspection hold constraint.",
    "Starting insulation (J) before rough inspection (I) is signed off covers up rough-in work before inspection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the proposed recovery plan.",
    "Maintain the mandatory rough inspection hold (I) before starting insulation (J)."
  ],
  "rationale": "The foreman proposes to start insulation (J) before the rough inspection (I) is completed to recover 2 days. However, the rough inspection (I) is marked as a red inspection hold, which cannot be bypassed. Covering electrical, plumbing, and HVAC rough-ins with insulation before inspection is a major code violation and would result in having to tear out the insulation for inspection.",
  "references": [
    "IBC Section 110.3.5 (Lath, gypsum board and plaster inspection)",
    "IBC Section 110.3.8 (Other inspections - rough-ins)"
  ]
}
